summary: Backend testing complete for Shop Order Delivery Code System. Tested verify-code endpoint, delivered endpoint code verification requirement, and order API delivery_code field. All 9 tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: verify-code endpoint (orders.py:928-1023) correctly validates: delivery user type, order assignment, status=on_the_way, and 4-digit code match
delivered endpoint (orders.py:1063-1067) correctly checks delivery_code_verified before allowing completion
Order creation (orders.py:176-179) generates 4-digit delivery_code using random.randint(1000, 9999)
Frontend OrderTrackingPage.js (lines 341-365) shows delivery_code when delivery_status='on_the_way'
Frontend DeliveryPages.js (lines 1046-1138) has delivery code modal with 4-digit input fields
seed_data_creation: Created test order: frontend_test_117ff3bd with delivery_code=4405, delivery_status=on_the_way
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop delivery code system tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/orders/{id}/delivery/verify-code (requires delivery user, order in on_the_way status, correct 4-digit code), POST /api/orders/{id}/delivery/delivered (requires delivery_code_verified=true first). Test order frontend_test_117ff3bd available for frontend testing with code 4405.

tests: Requires delivery user type (403 for buyers)
